_note: v2: game-first anchoring + game_reference rubric (see build_guide.v2 note).
template: {game} video game scene: shocked {subject} face on the left third, {money_object} glowing on the right, recognizable {game} setting and art style behind them, diagonal energy beam between them, {palette} palette, {lighting}, screaming contrast, clean zone for composited text
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low contrast, generic setting, unrelated game

rubric.game_reference: 1-5 — is THIS game unmistakable (creatures, environment, art style)?
